name: Rice Krispie Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a medium heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the marshmallows and cook until melted, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla.
4. Stir in the rice krispies cereal until well combined.
5. Moisten a spoon with water to prevent it from sticking.
6. Press the mixture into a greased 9-inch square pan.
7. Let set for 30 minutes before cutting into 24 pieces.
8. Each serving is one square, containing approximately 54 calories and 1 fruit choice, 1/2 fats & oils, and 9 grams of carbohydrates.
